message:
✨ Dynamically populate Replace Card modal from card catalog (#949)

Replace the hardcoded 8-card CARD_TYPES array in ReplaceCardModal with
dynamic population from CARD_CONFIGS, making all ~140 registered cards
available when replacing a card. Adds search filtering, category badges,
and scrollable grid layout.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
